purpose: This repository implements a hooks service for the CRB.Cos.Lending.Selling domain that publishes notifications about loan selling-related events. It acts as an integration point that converts domain events into standardized notifications that can be consumed by other systems via a hooks pattern.

apis.purpose: Health check endpoint for the service
Publishes loan selling-related notifications to the hooks system

dataEntities.name: LoanSaleStatusChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in loan sale status with associated loan details

dataEntities.name: BatchPurchaseCompleted
dataEntities.description: Represents completed batch purchase of loans with financial summaries

dataEntities.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeCharged
dataEntities.description: Represents a true-up volume fee charged for a specific month and year

dataEntities.name: InvestorChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in the investor associated with a loan

dataEntities.name: LoanTypeChanged
dataEntities.description: Represents a change in loan type for a specific loan

dataEntities.name: OverdueLoansAlert
dataEntities.description: Represents an alert about overdue loans with summary statistics

messagingPatterns.name: LoanSaleStatusChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes event when loan sale status changes

messagingPatterns.name: BatchPurchaseCompleted
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes event when batch purchase of loans completes

messagingPatterns.name: TrueUpVolumeFeeCharged
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes event when true-up volume fee is charged

messagingPatterns.name: InvestorChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes event when investor is changed for a loan

messagingPatterns.name: LoanTypeChanged
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes event when loan type is changed

messagingPatterns.name: OverdueLoansAlert
messagingPatterns.description: Publishes event for overdue loans alerts

findings.title: Missing authentication on health check endpoint
findings.description: The health check endpoint '/selling/hooks/health' doesn't have authentication requirements, which could potentially leak system information. Consider securing this endpoint or limiting the information it returns.
